## Precision / Floating-point concerns
<!-- Critical for risk engine - IEEE 754 compliance -->
<!-- Does this bug involve floating-point precision issues? -->
- [ ] Yes, involves floating-point precision
- [ ] No, not related to floating-point

If yes, please provide:
- Expected precision tolerance: [e.g., 1e-9]
- Actual observed deviation: [e.g., 1.5e-8]
- Operations involved: [e.g., sqrt, pow, division, Decimal]
